rationale: No qualitative change for Poland this cycle — Iran deal remains unresolved, Ukraine war continues at background level, no new direct threats to Polish security or economy.

top_events.title: Tehran says 'nothing' finalised after Trump claims Iran deal near
top_events.summary: The Iran nuclear/ceasefire deal remains in limbo, keeping mild uncertainty over global energy prices that indirectly affect Polish households and inflation.

top_events.title: Ukraine and Russia exchange cross-border attacks, three killed
top_events.summary: War continues at routine intensity near Poland's eastern border; no qualitative escalation, but ongoing conflict sustains low-level security concern for Polish residents.

top_events.title: China arrests US researcher on espionage charges
top_events.summary: Rising US-China tensions could indirectly affect global trade and EU economic stability, but impact on Poland remains distant and indirect at this stage.
